feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Recently we have activated FIORI in our sandbox system, we have activated service in SICF as well. 

When we are testing the service via SICF application is working but when we open the app from launchpad then we are getting Error message as below. Please note same application is working fine in other system.

In devtools there are so many errors I have found

Let me know if any notes need to apply or any configuration missed.

Advance thanks for your help.

Regards,

Nutan

entry.title: Variant update problem with variant management control ( sap.ui.fl.variants )
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I haven an issue with VariantManagement from sap.ui.fl library where it creates variant without any problem on `save` event. After it is saved, if i try to update it by adding new filters on screen but it fails to update variant. There is no error or anything on screen. When i check network tab, i can see request during initial save for creation but not with update. Overrite attribute is set to true and same codes are triggered in save. 
sample:

  variantManagerXML.attachEvent("save", (event) => {
                    try {
                        const filterData = mainFilter.getData();
                        const mParameters = event.getParameters();
                        mParameters.contexts = {
                            content: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(filterData))
                        };
                        this.byId("vm").setModified(true);
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error("Error during save:", error);
                    }
                });

 Where can be the problem on update ?

entry.title: User consumes excessive resources in Fiori
entry.content:
Hello

I hope you all are well,

I have a user that when he performs an application search and chooses the “User Menu”, the system slows down and takes a long time to search for the applications. CPU goes too high and all users get affected

Note: it is not necessary to do any search as such, just selecting the menu is enough to generate the slowness.

Does anyone have a similar case?

Thank you

entry.title: Limit number of tabs in web browser for Fiori
entry.content:
Hello 

does anyone know if it is possible to set a limit for the number of tabs that a user can open in the web browser for SAP Fiori?

Thank you

Sergio

entry.title: Attach File with CBO in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We need to attach files with Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud. Below is the requirement in details:

• We have created a Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud using “Custom Business Object” tile.
• We have created a free style Fiori app using this Custom Business Object in Business Application Studio.
• We need to attach files to this Custom Business Object using Fiori app.

Regards,

Iftikhar

entry.title: How to convert SAP WebDynpro Apps to FIORI apps with less efforts?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My client is having plenty of SAP ABAP Webdynpro apps and is looking for any tools (either standard or custom) to convert/migrate them into FIORI apps with less efforts. Because, manually developing custom FIORI apps by copying the code is obviously high-effort job.

Have you come across any standard or custom tools for this purpose?

 

Regards,

Bhaskar

entry.title: Delivery Performance (F2783) Vocabulary Annotation File ‘xxxx’ version ‘0001’ not found on SAP GW
entry.content:
Hello,

I have integrated the app: Delivery Performance - Delivered as Requested
for Sales Manager (F2783) in the SAP launchpad.
The app also works perfectly on the development environment, but errors occur on the test environment.

One is the following:
VokabAnnotatDatei 'C_SLSORDDELIVPERFANLYTSQRY_C_VAN', Vers. '0001', not found on SAP gateway server

And also that an exception has occurred for the service C_SLSORDDELIVPERFANLYTSQRY_CDS.

I have already emptied the metadata cache with the transactions.
I have also loaded the metadata for the “CATALOGSERVICE” V2 service on the test environment, but it also says that the client cannot be changed.
That's why I did it on the development environment and transported it, but the same errors still occur here.

Can anyone help me here?

entry.title: RAP - ListReport - Create button not appearing on LineItems
entry.content:
Hi, I have created a RAP framework and managed behavior implementation. I have chosen ListReport template for transactional app generation. 

Create/Update/Delete all fine with root node, but can't see "Create" button for child/Items. Could you please help here. attached the screenshot.

entry.title: problems with ui5 application deployments
entry.content:
good morning to all,
I have a question about this that came up when I wanted to deploy my ui5 application.
I have never been asked for “Authentication required to access the ATO Service” and I wanted to know where I can find the credentials I must enter .
Also if someone can explain me the reason for this message I would appreciate it very much,
(this happened after running the command “npm run deploy-config”)

 

thank you for your time.

max

entry.title: Is it possible to apply custom themes to the new "My Home" page in S4Hana 2023?
entry.content:
We recently upgraded to the S4Hana 2023 on-premise edition. We have some custom themes that we would like to apply but it seems that the new My Home functionality that was launched uses only the standard themes from SAP. The background image and background colors of the sections do not change. Are custom themes useless with "My Home" ?

Has anyone tried this? Any guidance is much appreciated.

entry.title: Dynamically assign Fiori tiles to end users?
entry.content:
Hi folks,

In the old portal-based ESS solutions it was possibly to dynamically control the visibility of various self-service applications from the backend ERP system..

This could be done both with the older Java based ESS via a proxy class, and the newer Web Dynpro ABAP ESS via a standard BAdI implementation.

Just wondering if anybody has found a way to do that with S/4HANA using the Fiori launchpad or Work Zone, without having to rely on PFCG roles?

entry.title: why does Fiori LeaveRequets -Onbehalf function converts status "Posted" to "Informed"?
entry.content:
Dear all,

with the Fiori app "My leave requests -Onbehalf funtion" I am facing a problem. As a Employee/Leave-Requester I see the leave requests with correct status as in SENT, APPROVED or REJECTED. But after running RPTARQPOST, my manager /approver sees the "POSTED" status entry as "INFORMED", as an Employees (Leave requester) I see as the status as "APPROVED".
Is there any Settings that i can change so the approver also sees Status as "APPROVED" or "POSTED" instead of "INFORMED"

I am very new to SAP and Fiori.If am posting this Question in wrong place , please do tell me where i can post for better reach.

Any help would be much appreciated .

Thanks in Advance.

NewBee

entry.title: How to Achieve a Side-by-Side Layout in a Fiori List Report While Keeping Variants?
entry.content:
Context:

I’m working on an SAP Fiori List Report application and need to achieve a side-by-side layout where:
✅A Smart Table occupies 75% of the width
✅A Pie Chart (Smart Chart) occupies 25% of the width
✅The layout must be fully responsive
✅Variant Management should be preserved

Approaches I Have Tried:

1️⃣Standard Fiori Elements List Report:

  • I attempted to use annotations in CDS to define both the table and chart.
  • However, I couldn’t control the layout (side-by-side) without custom CSS, which I want to avoid.

2️⃣Fiori Elements Extensions (Custom View in List Report):

  • I created a custom view extension and added a table and chart inside an HBox.
  • The layout works, but Variant Management is lost because it's outside the standard Smart Table controls.

3️⃣Analytical List Page (ALP) instead of List Report:

  • ALP supports side-by-side visuals by default.
  • However, I need List Report features (filters, actions, navigation) rather than ALP.

Question:

🔹Is it possible to achieve this side-by-side layout in a List Report while keeping variant management?
🔹If not, should I switch to a Custom Page and manually implement variants?
🔹Any best practices for keeping the UI responsive and aligned with Fiori guidelines?

 

Thank you in advanced for the help.

entry.title: Unable to preview the Fiori application in sap bas throwing Self signed certificate error.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a application using smart filterbar and smart table where i am trying to map the odataservice.

When i try to preview / check locally from the BAS the metadata is not getting loaded and throwing 500 Internal server error. When i checked the logs its throwing the below error.

Please help me on this...

entry.title: List Report Controller Extension - custom button plus lifecycle method overrides
entry.content:
I needed to add an action button to a custom List Report app. I used the usual action button controller extension to add the button and process the press event:

manifest:

 

 "extends": {
            "extensions": {
                "sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
                    "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport": {
                        "controllerName": "... .equipbcodelr.ext.controller.ListReportExt",
  "sap.ui.generic.app": {
    "zqmm_c_equipment_bc": {
      "EntitySet": "zqmm_c_equipment_bc",
        "Actions": {
          "barcodeSearch": {
            "id": "barcodeSearch",
            "text": "Barcode Search",
            "press": "scanMe",
            "requiresSelection": false
          },

 

 ext controller:

 

sap.ui.define([
  "sap/m/MessageToast"
], function(MessageToast) {
  "use strict";

  return { 
      scanMe: function(oEvent) {
          MessageToast.show("Custom handler invoked.");
          ...

 

This works great. However, I also want to override the onInit( ) method of the controller to prep a local JSON model. It does not allow me to override the lifecycle methods. To override the lifecycle methods I found out my controller needs to be like this:

 

sap.ui.define([
  "sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension",
	"sap/suite/ui/generic/template/extensionAPI/extensionAPI"
], function(ControllerExtension, BaseObject,ExtensionAPI) {
    'use strict';

  return ControllerExtension.extend("...ext.controller.ListReportExt",{
      override:{
        onInit: function(oEvent){
              . . .

 

As soon as I change my controller to:

it no longer executes the press event of my custom action function scanMe: function( ).

How can I combine these two, have my controller handle the custom action button as well as override the lifecycle methods like onInit( )?

Would appreciate any hints.

Thanks

entry.title: No Successor App available for Manage Catalog Item Recommendations (F3293)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

Good day!

Raising this request for assistance to look/find a possible successor or related app to Manage Catalog Item Recommendations that can still do the same functionality.

We appreciate any help/assistance in any way.

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: navigate to the component/version object page of the same entity
entry.content:
Hi all,

i have an entity books

books: cuid{

title:string

bookid:string

isdeleted: boolean

versions: Association to many books on  versions.bookid = $self.bookid and versions.isDeleted = true and versions.isDeleted != $self.isDeleted ;

}

this gives a table of versions in the object page 

adding the below in manifest enables the navigation

in routes

"name": "versionDetail",
"pattern": "books({key})/versions({key2}):?query:",
"target": "versionDetail"
 
 
in targets of object page 
"navigation": {
"versions": {
"detail": {
"route": "versionDetail"
}
}
say the current version key is k1 and one of the previous version key is k2
 
on click of a lineitem of table the url goes to books(k1)/versions(k2)
but i want the navigation to happen to books(k2)
the table comes from cap annotations not in the frontend
thanks in advance.

entry.title: Issue with Overlapping Header Elements in an SAPUI5 Object Page
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm developing an SAPUI5 application that uses the sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout control to display details. However, I've noticed that the header elements are rendered in a disorganized manner, with some of them overlapping.

I've already verified the following:

  • The sap.uxap library is correctly included in the bootstrap (along with sap.m and sap.ui.layout).
  • My root view is structured using a standard <App> (sap.m.App), so I don't believe that's causing the issue.
  • Within the Object Page, I've configured both the headerTitle and headerContent using different layouts (such as FlexBox, VBox, HorizontalLayout, etc.), but the overlapping issue still persists.

 

Below is the relevant XML code for my view:

 

<mvc:View
    xmlns:table="sap.ui.table"
    controllerName="com.controller.ContactDetail"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:smartFilterBar="sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar"
    xmlns:smartTable="sap.ui.comp.smarttable"
    xmlns:f="sap.f"
    xmlns:layout="sap.ui.layout"
    xmlns:ux="sap.uxap"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:form="sap.ui.layout.form"
    xmlns:tnt="sap.tnt"
    height="100%"
>
    <ux:ObjectPageLayout
        id="ObjectPageLayout"
        showTitleInHeaderContent="true"
        upperCaseAnchorBar="false"
        showFooter="{= ${roleModel>/edit} }"
    >
        <ux:headerTitle>
            <ux:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle>
                <ux:breadcrumbs>
                    <Breadcrumbs id="breadcrumbsId" currentLocationText="Object Page Example" >
                        <Link text="Page 1 a very long link" press="handleLink1Press"/>
                        <Link text="Page 2 long link" press="handleLink2Press"/>
                    </Breadcrumbs>
                </ux:breadcrumbs>

                <ux:expandedHeading>
                    <HBox>
                        <Title text="Denise Smith" wrapping="true"/>
                        <ObjectMarker type="Favorite" class="sapUiTinyMarginBegin"/>
                    </HBox>
                </ux:expandedHeading>

                <ux:snappedHeading>
                    <FlexBox fitContainer="true" alignItems="Center">
                        <Avatar src="./test-resources/sap/uxap/images/imageID_275314.png" class="sapUiTinyMarginEnd"/>
                        <Title text="Denise Smith" wrapping="true"/>
                    </FlexBox>
                </ux:snappedHeading>

                <ux:expandedContent>
                    <Text text="Senior UI Developer"/>
                </ux:expandedContent>

                <ux:snappedContent>
                    <Text text="Senior UI Developer"/>
                </ux:snappedContent>

                <ux:snappedTitleOnMobile>
                    <Title text="Senior UI Developer"/>
                </ux:snappedTitleOnMobile>

                <ux:actions>
                    <OverflowToolbarButton icon="sap-icon://edit" text="edit header" type="Emphasized" tooltip="edit">
                        <layoutData>
                            <OverflowToolbarLayoutData priority="NeverOverflow"/>
                        </layoutData>
                    </OverflowToolbarButton>
                    <OverflowToolbarButton icon="sap-icon://pull-down" text="show section" type="Emphasized" tooltip="pull-down"/>
                    <OverflowToolbarButton icon="sap-icon://show" text="show state" tooltip="show"/>
                    <Button text="Toggle Footer" press="toggleFooter"/>
                </ux:actions>
            </ux:ObjectPageDynamicHeaderTitle>
        </ux:headerTitle>

        <ux:headerContent>
            <FlexBox wrap="Wrap">
                <Avatar class="sapUiSmallMarginEnd" src="./test-resources/sap/uxap/images/imageID_275314.png" displaySize="L" />
                <layout:VerticalLayout class="sapUiSmallMarginBeginEnd">
                    <Link text="+33 6 4512 5158"/>
                    <Link text="DeniseSmith@sap.com"/>
                </layout:VerticalLayout>
                <layout:HorizontalLayout class="sapUiSmallMarginBeginEnd">
                    <Image src="./test-resources/sap/uxap/images/linkedin.png"/>
                    <Image src="./test-resources/sap/uxap/images/Twitter.png" class="sapUiSmallMarginBegin"/>
                </layout:HorizontalLayout>
                <layout:VerticalLayout class="sapUiSmallMarginBeginEnd">
                    <Label text="Hello! I am Denise and I use UxAP"/>
                    <VBox>
                        <Label text="Achieved goals"/>
                        <ProgressIndicator percentValue="30" displayValue="30%"/>
                    </VBox>
                </layout:VerticalLayout>
                <layout:VerticalLayout class="sapUiSmallMarginBeginEnd">
                    <Label text="San Jose, USA"/>
                </layout:VerticalLayout>
            </FlexBox>
        </ux:headerContent>

        <!-- Rest of the Object Page configuration (sections, footer, etc.) -->

    </ux:ObjectPageLayout>
</mvc:View>

 

And the root view is defined as follows:

 

<mvc:View 
    controllerName="com.controller.App"
    displayBlock="true"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m">
    <App id="app">
    </App>
</mvc:View>

 

 

My question:
Even though I have the usual configuration and have included all the necessary libraries, the header elements (both in headerTitle and headerContent) are overlapping or arranged incorrectly.
Has anyone encountered this behavior or know what might be causing it? Any suggestions or solutions to prevent the overlapping of these elements would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for any help or suggestions!

entry.title: FIORI logon to app with default creditials
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have such a special case, business want to use small confirmation app without logon.

it is a simple app where is only possible to push button and confirm that the text was readed and it does not matter who did.

we created a technical user and in transaction SICF - > tab "logon data"  for Odata and for UI5 app set this user and password, so the app should be always logon with this user without requesting any other logon information.

But when we call the app the logon page occurs.

when we try to test just the OData service by GetEntitySet. we receive also the pop-up window for logon data, but in case we cancel the pop-up we can see the technical user is logon and the service return the data from Method GetEntitySet.

it seems like there is some higher lever authentification requiring the logon data.

do you have any idea what should be swiched on/off or should be set to avoid the logon pop-up or logon page?

entry.title: Dynamic Column Headers for Parent and Child Rows in sap.ui.table.TreeTable
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am working with sap.ui.table.TreeTable in SAP UI5 and need to display hierarchical data where parent rows and child rows have different column headers.

Does SAP UI5 officially support different column headers for parent and child nodes in TreeTable?
If not, is there an alternative approach within SAP’s recommended best practices?


Thank you!

Regards,

Preeti
